Occurrences.description: Number of times a particular difference has been registred.

PropertyId.description: The name of the evaluated property. Only applicable for ResultType 'Difference'.

AverageDifference.description: Average difference between the input and returned item. Only applicable for Results of type 'Difference' for numerical values.

MaximumDifference.description: Maximum difference between the input and returned item. Only applicable for Results of type 'Difference' for numerical values.

MaximumDifferenceInputItem.description: Value of the input item for the maximum difference. Only applicable for Results of type 'Difference' for numerical values.

MaximumDifferenceReturnedItem.description: Value of the returned item for the maximum difference. Only applicable for Results of type 'Difference' for numerical values.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
